subcodes.first_line: O concourse of earth! Hearken unto the Call from this Lote-Tree that hath been raised up upon the luminous spot [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ملا الارض ان استمعوا الندآء من هذه السدره التی ارتفعت علی البقعه النورآء
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
